t_apply_empty.solution:
Lemma t_apply_empty : forall (A : Type) (x : string) (v : A),
  (__ !-> v) x = v.
Proof.
  intros A x v. unfold t_empty. reflexivity.
Qed.
t_apply_empty.explanation: The empty total map is defined as a constant function, so applying it to any key returns the default value.

t_update_eq.solution:
Lemma t_update_eq : forall (A : Type) (m : total_map A) x v,
  (x !-> v ; m) x = v.
Proof.
  intros A m x v. unfold t_update. rewrite String.eqb_refl. reflexivity.
Qed.
t_update_eq.explanation: Looking up a key just updated returns the new value, because String.eqb x x = true.

t_update_neq.solution:
Theorem t_update_neq : forall (A : Type) (m : total_map A) x1 x2 v,
  x1 <> x2 ->
  (x1 !-> v ; m) x2 = m x2.
Proof.
  intros A m x1 x2 v H. unfold t_update.
  apply String.eqb_neq in H. rewrite H. reflexivity.
Qed.
t_update_neq.explanation: Looking up a different key after an update returns the original map's value, since eqb x1 x2 = false.

t_update_shadow.solution:
Lemma t_update_shadow : forall (A : Type) (m : total_map A) x v1 v2,
  (x !-> v2 ; x !-> v1 ; m) = (x !-> v2 ; m).
Proof.
  intros A m x v1 v2. apply functional_extensionality. intros x'.
  unfold t_update. destruct (String.eqb x x'); reflexivity.
Qed.
t_update_shadow.explanation: A double update on the same key shadows the first update. We use functional extensionality and case analysis on the key equality.

t_update_same.solution:
Theorem t_update_same : forall (A : Type) (m : total_map A) x,
  (x !-> m x ; m) = m.
Proof.
  intros A m x. apply functional_extensionality. intros x'.
  unfold t_update. destruct (String.eqb_spec x x') as [H | H].
  - subst. reflexivity.
  - reflexivity.
Qed.
t_update_same.explanation: Updating a key with its current value produces the same map. We use eqb_spec for case analysis.

t_update_permute.solution:
Theorem t_update_permute : forall (A : Type) (m : total_map A)
                                  v1 v2 x1 x2,
  x2 <> x1 ->
  (x1 !-> v1 ; x2 !-> v2 ; m)
  =
  (x2 !-> v2 ; x1 !-> v1 ; m).
Proof.
  intros A m v1 v2 x1 x2 H. apply functional_extensionality. intros x'.
  unfold t_update.
  destruct (String.eqb_spec x1 x') as [H1 | H1];
  destruct (String.eqb_spec x2 x') as [H2 | H2];
  try reflexivity.
  subst. exfalso. apply H. reflexivity.
Qed.
t_update_permute.explanation: Updates on distinct keys commute. If both keys equal x', we derive a contradiction from x2 <> x1.
